context.projectOverview: agent-bober Phase 3, Sprint 5 of 5 (final). Make facts populate automatically and feed planning. A deterministic detector reads manifests/config → project facts (testCommand/buildCommand/packageManager/framework) written through reconcile (Sprint 2) at runPipeline + chat-session startup, guarded so a facts failure NEVER aborts a run. retrieveRelevantFacts + a bounded serializer inject scope-isolated active facts into planner/curator context next to the lessons block. NO LLM produces facts — only reconcile's ambiguity branch may.

completedSprints.title: Reconcile-on-write
completedSprints.summary: reconcileFact(store, incoming, {judge?, now}) + writeFact wrapper (re-exported from facts.ts) → ReconcileAction. Deterministic NOOP/ADD/UPDATE-supersede; ambiguity→injected judge w/ ADD fallback. USE writeFact for the detector's writes (idempotent: unchanged→NOOP, changed→supersede).

completedSprints.title: Lesson hygiene
completedSprints.summary: retrieve.ts tokenize/scoreRecord pattern to mirror for fact ranking; serializeLessonsForPlanner pattern to mirror for serializeFactsForContext.

completedSprints.title: Fail→pass contrast
completedSprints.summary: distill signal (d). Unrelated to this sprint.

decisionsLocked.Q3: B — wire an auto-producer. DETERMINISTIC project-fact detector (NO LLM to produce facts). detectProjectFacts is PURE — takes already-parsed inputs ({packageJson, boberConfig}); fs reads live in a thin caller.
decisionsLocked.guardedWiring: The detect+reconcile block at runPipeline start AND chat-session startup MUST be wrapped in try/catch that logs a warning and CONTINUES — a facts failure must NEVER abort a pipeline/chat run. Additive only; do not reorder existing phases.
decisionsLocked.scopeIsolation: retrieveRelevantFacts returns only t_invalidated IS NULL rows for the requested scope and NEVER another scope's facts. serializeFactsForContext respects a hard charBudget (output length <= budget). Default scope '' / programming team per the namespace convention.
decisionsLocked.noLLMonProducePath: The only LLM anywhere in the production fact path is reconcile's ambiguity branch (Sprint 2). The detector and retrieval are LLM-free.

principles: Read .bober/principles.md. Gates: TS strict (zero errors), ESLint consistent-type-imports (`import type`), ESM .js specifiers, no `any` unjustified, section comments, deterministic output, conventional commit `bober(sprint-5): ...`. SENSITIVE FILES: pipeline.ts and chat-session.ts are load-bearing — make ONLY additive, guarded changes near startup; do not touch existing phase ordering or unrelated logic; keep the existing full suite (2180 tests) green.
